description_long: This house is nestled within a dense forest of white, snow-covered trees, with a cluster of green, bushy foliage on one side. The structure itself is modern, featuring flat roofs and a geometric layout with multiple rectangular volumes. The exterior appears to be clad in light-colored materials, possibly wood or concrete, with large windows that blend into the natural surroundings. The house is partially obscured by the surrounding trees, giving it a secluded, private feel. The landscape is uneven, with the house set against a backdrop of tall, green hills and lush vegetation. The overall setting suggests a harmonious integration of architecture and nature, ideal for a tranquil residential retreat.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by dense, snow-covered trees and lush green hills, blending architecture with nature for a secluded, tranquil atmosphere.
description_view_0: The house is partially visible through a thick cluster of white trees, with green hills and foliage on the right side.
description_view_1: The front of the house is mostly hidden by trees, but the geometric rooflines and some windows are visible, framed by green hills on both sides.
description_view_2: The house is seen from the opposite side, with more of the flat roof and rectangular layout exposed, and green foliage concentrated on the left.
description_view_3: The house is almost entirely surrounded by white trees, with only the roof and a few windows peeking through, and green hills in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flat overhang, large glass door, and no visible porch or decorative columns
